title: cyperus corymbosus
intro: Cyperus corymbosus, also known as umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Cyperus corymbosus is often used in infusions, decoctions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
